message:
fix(ci): add git pull --rebase before push in update-dashboard-dep

Bump version to 0.9.8

files.patch:
@@ -232,6 +232,7 @@ jobs:
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
           git add packages/dashboard/package.json
           git commit -m "chore(dashboard): update termweb to ^$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
+          git pull --rebase origin main
           git push
 
   publish-dashboard:

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.7",
+  "version": "0.9.8",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
